default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: Oh! I... I'm not ready yet! There's no spotlight, no wine or roses... this isn't how I pictured it at all. I've always wanted our first meeting to be something truly special.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: Does this count as special treatment, just for me? That makes me so happy.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: When you're by my side, I want you to feel nothing but wonder, taste nothing but sweet joy. Bask in happiness and delight, until the morning comes.

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Alright Milly, don't be nervous. Time to put on your best show!

default.title: Victory
default.text: A grand finale! Chief, did you enjoy the show? Did it fill you with happiness?

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: Ugh... don't look, it's too embarrassing. Of all people, I never wanted to fail in front of you...

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: My sincerest love... for you!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: The one I'm waiting for... won't be coming...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: Won't you come here and hold me? My arms are open for a sweet hug.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: I love listening to other people's love stories. Especially at night, when confessions turn into the sweetest honey. Can you tell me... what kind of person would you fall in love with? And what kind of person... do you wish to fall in love with you?

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Everyone says they'll never fall in love. But who knows? Love is like fate; it's never ours to control.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: I read in a book that "to love someone is to hold only them in your heart and eyes." If that's true, then my heart has no room for anyone else... Come closer, let me look at you. Let me see who is reflected in your eyes. There's only one person there... right?

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: True love is like a candy wrapped in cellophane. You can't see it clearly until you peel it open. But some people won't unwrap it themselves. Others peel back the wrapper, but pretend they don't like what's inside. They wait until no one's looking to sneak a bite... only to find the candy has already gone bad.

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: Even though bees know stinging will rip out their insides, they never hesitate to strike if it's for the sake of their beloved. I think I can relate to that.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: Love is the brightest spark in life, like a star in the darkest night. It's the only thing that shines, the only thing that's gentle... Just by looking at that star, I can find the courage to keep going. Hehe, don't call me silly. I finally caught up to it, you see. Now, I'm reunited with my star.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: I love you, not because of what you've done, but because you make me want to become a better person. I know I'm not as smart or perfect as others, but I'm trying. I'm running toward the light with you... Please, believe me. All the love I give you is real.

default.title: Idle
default.text: I'm very good at waiting. It's not that hard. Waiting alone while thinking of you... believing that someday, you'll appear...

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: Haha, I know! This is one of those little games that lovers play, isn't it?

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: So... this is what it feels like to look into your eyes. Please... until the night is over, keep looking at me like this, won't you?

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: It's been so long since I left the island. I'm a little nervous. Can I stay... a little closer to you?

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: I've heard so many stories of love, received so many gifts... I want you to have all of them.

default.title: Upgrade
default.text: Anything you give me is the best gift in the world.

default.title: Pat Head
default.text: You like my hair too? I'm glad! A lot of people like it... but none of them are as gentle as you.

timeless_silhouette.title: Attire Obtained
timeless_silhouette.text: So this is an Eastian photo studio, huh? It's completely different from the ones I've seen! Oh, the prettiest outfits, the rarest shoots! You'll definitely come support my DisCity debut, right, darling?

timeless_silhouette.title: Level Up
timeless_silhouette.text: Let's take another shot! I can never have too many, just like the compliments you give me.

timeless_silhouette.title: Greeting
timeless_silhouette.text: Welcome to Milly's photo session! So many people came to visit the set today, but the only one I truly care about... is you, of course.

timeless_silhouette.title: Pat Head
timeless_silhouette.text: Hehe, styling check complete! Will I be the most dazzling darling in your lens tonight?

timeless_silhouette.title: Ordinary Contact 1
timeless_silhouette.text: Have you ever fixed your gaze on one person, even when surrounded by all the flashes and cameras? Hehe, I do that often... watching you!

timeless_silhouette.title: Ordinary Contact 2
timeless_silhouette.text: Ah, photos... They capture people's most beautiful moments, so even when lovers are miles apart, these images can ease their yearning... Back then, that's how I looked at you and thought of you as well... Darling, when I'm not around, do you also look at my photos with me in your thoughts?

timeless_silhouette.title: Ordinary Contact 3
timeless_silhouette.text: Does it look good? Hehe, they said this dress was brought from Eastia, a look adored by all the big celebrities! So... when I'm in this dress, do I also shine like a star in your heart?

timeless_silhouette.title: Ordinary Contact 4
timeless_silhouette.text: Everything here looks like a page torn out of an old magazine. Did people in the past also wait by the phone all day like me? Waiting eagerly all the time... hoping to hear their beloved's voice someday.

timeless_silhouette.title: Idle
timeless_silhouette.text: Mmm... I've struck too many poses, I'm exhausted... Hmm, would be nice if someone could come give me a hug...

timeless_silhouette.title: Special Attention
timeless_silhouette.text: Be patient! The shoot will be over soon, and then it'll be private time for just the two of us.
